description_long: This is a round wooden table with a smooth, natural finish and a simple, minimalist design. The tabletop is circular and appears to be made from light-colored wood, displaying a subtle wood grain pattern across its surface. The table is supported by four straight, cylindrical legs that are evenly spaced and attached directly to the underside of the tabletop. There are no visible decorative elements, hardware, or additional features such as drawers or shelves. The construction suggests a sturdy yet lightweight build, suitable for casual use in communal or public spaces. Its neutral appearance allows it to blend seamlessly into a variety of urban environments, such as parks, outdoor cafes, or community gathering areas.
description: A round, light wood table with a smooth surface and four straight legs, featuring a minimalist and sturdy design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round tabletop and two of the four straight legs clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side-angled view highlighting the wood grain on the tabletop and the alignment of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the tabletop and two legs most prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side-angled view, again showing the wood grain and leg placement from a different angle.
